title: WIP: [DO NOT MERGE] pick up storage#1560
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

Quite the opposite: if it works, additional image stores will act slightly less weird.

```release-note
None
```

All green.

I restarted the flaked machine job.
Rebased, in part because #18090 has been merged, in part hoping that a reset will help CI launch that failing job.
I've seen the machine error on other PRs, so I doubt it's specific to these changes. Restarted anyways.
And all happy green test buttons here.  Do we start dancing the vendor dance?
Looks like #18130 is doing that; closing this one.
